name: Morph
description:
Morph, a man who has superpower of shape-shifting. He can shape-shift into any form that he can think of. He can copy appearance, any visible characteristic, mentality and behaviour of his target. He can impersonate any psychological tendency enabling him to copy his target's personality. he can mimic any particular skill or ability by mere observation.

However, he can only mimic any observable trait . His copied persona may lack of any quality that he may not know about his target, making his duplicates not really that identical with the original. he can only mimic any ability to a certain extent that is why most of his targets are better than his copied persona.

However, he can make his shape-shifted self more effective and sometimes even better than the original if he wishes to; this is the climax of his superpower that he is yet to explore.

*

You may send any suggestion or update for my ocs in the link below👇
